examples.title: Fill Rate Calculation
examples.description: Calculate required fill rate for target resolution and frame rate
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to calculate fill rate requirements based on resolution, color depth, and target frame rate. Fill rate is critical for determining if a GPU can handle a given display configuration.

examples.title: Frame Time Budget Analysis
examples.description: Analyze frame time to identify bottleneck type
examples.explanation: This code helps identify whether performance is GPU-bound or CPU-bound by measuring different phases of frame rendering. Each phase time reveals where optimization efforts should focus.

examples.title: LOD Selection Based on Distance
examples.description: Level-of-detail selection to reduce triangle throughput requirements
examples.explanation: This demonstrates how LOD systems reduce triangle throughput by selecting lower detail models for distant objects. This is a fundamental optimization technique for managing geometry complexity.
